subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: Advance always in the Kingdom of Bahá'u'lláh; occupy thy heart always by the mentioning of Bahá'u'lláh
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @law of repetition; recitation of the Greatest Name, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
